articles.title: Kevin O'Leary sued after accusing Utah AI data centre critics of acting as foreign agents
articles.description: The founders of two community groups in Utah are suing Canadian businessman Kevin O'Leary and the Fox News network, claiming the entrepreneur falsely accused them in multiple interviews of working for the Chinese government to stop a proposed data centre in their state.
